# CheckAPI - LLM API Key Validator

## Overview
CheckAPI is a privacy-first web application that validates API keys for 12+ LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Groq, Perplexity, HuggingFace, Replicate, Together AI, Cohere, and Mistral.

## Key Features
- Client-side validation (keys never leave browser)
- Multi-provider support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Groq, Perplexity, HuggingFace, Replicate, Together AI, Cohere, Mistral)
- Detailed results with models, latency, and rate limits
- Free API endpoint for programmatic access
- CLI tool for automation
- Dark mode support

## Supported Providers
1. OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-3.5-turbo)
2. Anthropic (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus, Claude 3 Haiku)
3. Google Gemini (Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash)
4. Groq
5. Perplexity
6. HuggingFace
7. Replicate
8. Together AI
9. Cohere
10. Mistral
11. AWS Bedrock (detection only)
12. Azure OpenAI (detection only)

## Privacy & Security
- All validation happens client-side in your browser
- API keys are never sent to proxy servers
- Keys are never logged or stored
- Direct API calls from browser to provider endpoints
- Displayed keys are truncated (first 8 characters only)

## API Usage
Endpoint: POST https://checkapis.pages.dev/api/check
Rate Limit: 20 requests per minute per IP

Example:
```bash
curl -X POST https://checkapis.pages.dev/api/check \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"keys": ["sk-proj-..."]}'
```

Response includes: provider, validity, models, latency, rate limits

## CLI Usage
```bash
npm run build:cli
node dist/cli/cli/index.js sk-proj-...
node dist/cli/cli/index.js -f keys.txt
cat keys.txt | node dist/cli/cli/index.js --json
```

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Static export for Cloudflare Pages

## Source Code
GitHub: https://github.com/Teycir/CheckAPI
